commands: bash -lc 'cd /path/to/backend && export CI=1 NO_COLOR=1 PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1 && npx prisma migrate status --schema prisma/schema.prisma > /tmp/codex_prisma_status.log 2>&1; rc=True; tr -cd '\''\\11\\12\\15\\40-\\176'\'' < /tmp/codex_prisma_status.log; exit '
